text:

Date: Mon Nov 25 19:13:56 2013
New Revision: 334885
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/334885

Log:
  - Remove www/trac-gitplugin
  
  PR:		ports/184266

  Reference:	http://trac-hacks.org/wiki/GitPlugin

Deleted:
  head/www/trac-gitplugin/
Modified:
  head/www/Makefile

Modified: head/www/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/Makefile	Mon Nov 25 19:13:22 2013	(r334884)
+++ head/www/Makefile	Mon Nov 25 19:13:56 2013	(r334885)
@@ -1972,7 +1972,6 @@
     SUBDIR += trac-fullblog
     SUBDIR += trac-fullblognotification
     SUBDIR += trac-gantt
-    SUBDIR += trac-gitplugin
     SUBDIR += trac-graphviz
     SUBDIR += trac-hierwiki
     SUBDIR += trac-iniadmin
